source_name: ACCC Measuring Broadband Australia Report 32 - busy-hour download performance
notes: Manual entry from ACCC Measuring Broadband Australia Report 32 and appendix tables, April 2026. The displayed value is the lower end of the state/territory range for average NBN fixed-line download performance during busy hours in December 2025; the full range is 94.8% to 99.4% of plan speed. This is not a median Mbps measure.
citation: Australian Competition and Consumer Commission, Measuring Broadband Australia Report 32, April 2026.

fields.metric: Average NBN fixed-line download performance during busy hours, by state and territory
fields.source_boundary: Includes underperforming and impaired services; excludes very high speed services. ACCC reports this row as percentage of plan speed rather than a median Mbps speed.
